items.title: Kingston Flemings, Zuby Ejiofor, and Asa Newell are all OUT today for the Hawks.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Kingston Flemings, Zuby Ejiofor, and Asa Newell are all OUT today for the Hawks.

No injuries for those 3 players. Just will be listed as inactive.

Other players out:

Keshon Gilbert — Left Adductor
RayJ Dennis — Right Achilles
Jacob Toppin — Left Adductor/Quad

items.title: Summer Hawks beats Brooklyn 83-76 despite a very meh evening from lotto pick Kingston Flemings. Good minutes from Zuby Ejiofor, a poster dunk from Henri Veesaar and some solid play from the G Leaguers.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
Summer Hawks beats Brooklyn 83-76 despite a very meh evening from lotto pick Kingston Flemings. Good minutes from Zuby Ejiofor, a poster dunk from Henri Veesaar and some solid play from the G Leaguers. 

Nets shot 2-of-24 from 3. YIKES!!

items.title: The Hawks have signed No. 23 pick Zuby Ejiofor and No. 52 pick Henri Veesaar.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
The Hawks have signed No. 23 pick Zuby Ejiofor and No. 52 pick Henri Veesaar.

Ejiofor is his rookie-scale deal for that draft slot.

Of note, Veesaar is NOT a Two-Way deal. It’s a standard contract.

(Flemings to come, maybe as soon as today)

Hawks now have 16 contracts.

items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
The Hawks will hold the intro press conference for Flemings, Ejiofor, and Veesaar today at 11:30 am ET.

The great @bobrathbuntv.bsky.social is hosting.

It will be streamed on the Hawks official YouTube channel, for those interested.

items.title: FWIW -- I had Henri Veesaar in the same tier as Zuby Ejiofor and would've thought it was a totally reasonable pick at No. 23 last night.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
FWIW -- I had Henri Veesaar in the same tier as Zuby Ejiofor and would've thought it was a totally reasonable pick at No. 23 last night.

Surprisingly falls all the way into the 50's and the Hawks get a tremendous value.

ATL also values 5-out spacing and he can provide that at center.

items.title: Hawks drafted Zuby Ejiofor in first round this year and Asa Newell in first round last year. Now add first round value at 52 with Henri Veesaar.

items.title: Zuby Ejiofor is the pick at No. 23 for the Hawks.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Zuby Ejiofor is the pick at No. 23 for the Hawks. 

Combo big out of St. John's. Plays incredibly hard and is a very intriguing and talented defender.

Another example of the Hawks going BPA on their board, but I think he can eventually play both the 4 and 5 in the NBA.

items.title: New: Yesterday, the Sixers reportedly worked out St. John's prospect Zuby Ejiofor.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
New: Yesterday, the Sixers reportedly worked out St. John's prospect Zuby Ejiofor.

A few hours prior, I talked to Nathan Grubel from No Ceilings about why he is infatuated with Ejiofor's fit in Philadelphia at No. 22 overall.

This sounds like a fun prospect:

www.phillyvoice.com/sixers-news-...

media.title: Asking an NBA Draft expert about Zuby Ejiofor's fit with the Sixers
media.description: "Ejiofor can finish at the rim, pass to the open man, operate in several areas on the floor, and cause all types of chaos defensively given his versatility. That’s a winning player in today’s game."

items.title: Zuby Ejiofor would likely be considered a reach at 22 depending on who’s on the board, but he’s one of my favorite players in the draft. Absolute dog.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Zuby Ejiofor would likely be considered a reach at 22 depending on who’s on the board, but he’s one of my favorite players in the draft. Absolute dog.
